The Boss Baby (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $175,003,033Details
International Box Office $352,906,916
Worldwide Box Office $527,909,949
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $16,991,228
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $15,422,817
Total $32,414,045
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A universal story about how a new baby’s arrival impacts a family, told from the point of view of a delightfully unreliable narrator, a wildly imaginative 7 year old named Tim.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,198,902 (28.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,773 opening theaters/3,829 max. theaters, 8.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $233,337,375

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 31st, 2017 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: March 17th, 2017 (Wide) (Australia)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Peru)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Ukraine)
March 24th, 2017 (Wide) (Chile)
Video Release: July 25th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2456 (Cert #50833), 12/21/2016)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Franchise: The Boss Baby
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Non-Chronological, Talking Babies, Undercover
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A universal story about how a new baby’s arrival impacts a family, told from the point of view of a delightfully unreliable narrator, a wildly imaginative 7 year old named Tim.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,198,902 (28.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,773 opening theaters/3,829 max. theaters, 8.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $233,337,375

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 31st, 2017 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox

Video Release: July 25th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2456 (Cert #50833), 12/21/2016)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Franchise: The Boss Baby
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Non-Chronological, Talking Babies, Undercover
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
